# Expensa

> Expensa is a privacy-first expense tracker for iPhone. No account required. Automatically imports Apple Pay transactions, categorizes expenses using on-device AI, and syncs privately via iCloud. Built by Andrew Sereda.

## Key Facts

- Platform: iPhone (iOS 17+)
- Price: Free
- No account, no email, no sign-up required
- Apple Pay transactions imported automatically — no bank login, no credentials
- On-device AI categorization — your data never leaves your phone
- iCloud sync across your devices, privately
- Multi-currency support
- Budget tracking, shared expense spaces, recurring transactions

## What Makes Expensa Different

Most expense trackers require a bank connection or sell your financial data to third parties. Expensa imports Apple Pay transactions directly from your device — no bank login, no third-party data broker, no cloud processing. Privacy is not a feature; it is the architecture.
